title: Useful Armor Trims
description: A plugin that makes armor trims give stats depending on the material.
body:
# Useful Armor Trims
This plugin allows for armor trims to give attributes based on their material and trim pattern. The attribute given to the player is based on the material and then the trim pattern multiplys the value based on its difficulty to obtain in game.

## Material List
| Material            | Attribute             | Value                |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Amethyst            | Movement Speed              | +0.025 (Base: 0.1)             |
| Copper            | Step Height              | +0.5 (Base: 0.6)             |
| Diamond            | Armor              | +1.5 (Base: 0)             |
| Emerald            | Luck              | +2 (Base: 0)             |
| Resin            | Safe Fall Distance              | +2 (Base: 3)             |
| Gold            | Block Break Speed              | +0.25 (Base: 1)             |
| Iron            | Armor Toughness              | +0.75 (Base: 0)             |
| Lapis            | Water Movement Efficiency              | +1 (Base: 0)             |
| Netherite            | Attack Damage              | +1 (Base: 1)             |
| Quartz            | Attack Speed              | +0.2 (Base: 4)             |
| Restone            | Max Health              | +2 (Base: 20)             |

## Pattern Multipliers
| Pattern            | Multiplier             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Bolt            | 2              |
| Coast            | 0.75              |
| Dune            | 0.6              |
| Eye            | 1.75              |
| Flow            | 2.1              |
| Host            | 1.4              |
| Raiser            | 1.45              |
| Rib            | 1.6              |
| Sentry            | 1.1              |
| Shaper            | 1.4              |
| Silence            | 3              |
| Snout            | 1.8              |
| Spire            | 2.2              |
| Tide            | 1              |
| Vex            | 1.4              |
| Ward            | 1.8              |
| Wayfinder            | 1.5              |
| Wild            | 0.65              |
